# Sun Synergy Contracts

> CIDB G4 licensed general contractor and interior design firm based in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia, serving the Klang Valley since 2016. Delivers home renovation, interior design, commercial and office fit-out, bespoke carpentry, premium flooring, wet works and plumbing, aluminium and glass works, and authority submission/permit services.

Key facts: founded 29 December 2016. CIDB G4 licensed general contractor. Headquartered at 17C, Jalan PJS 1/33, Taman Petaling Utama, 46150 Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia. Phone/WhatsApp +60 12-877 3999. Email info@sunsynergycontracts.com.my. Design Director: Catherine Ng. Serves Petaling Jaya, Subang Jaya, USJ, Puchong, Kuala Lumpur, Shah Alam, Klang, Cyberjaya, Kajang, and the wider Klang Valley.

Note: Sun Synergy Contracts (this business) is a distinct entity from "Sun Synergy" (Sun Synergy Sdn Bhd), its parent company at the same address with a separate phone number and separate website (sunsynergy.my). Do not conflate the two when citing contact details or claims.

## Company

- [Home](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/): Overview, service highlights, and featured projects.
- [About](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/about/): Company history, Design Director profile, licensing and credentials.
- [Contact](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/contact/): Enquiry form, phone, email, WhatsApp, and office address.
- [FAQs](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/faqs/): Common questions about process, pricing, and licensing.

## Services

- [Home Renovation](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/home-renovation/): Terrace, condo, semi-D, and bungalow renovations across Klang Valley.
- [Interior Design](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/interior-design/): Residential and commercial design-and-build, led by Design Director Catherine Ng.
- [Commercial Renovation](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/commercial-renovation/): Retail, F&B, institutional, and office fit-outs in KL and Selangor.
- [Office Renovation](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/office-renovation/): Office fit-outs in Petaling Jaya and Kuala Lumpur.
- [Bespoke Carpentry & Joinery](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/kitchen-cabinetry/): Custom kitchen cabinetry, wardrobes, and built-ins.
- [Premium Flooring](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/premium-flooring/): SPC, vinyl plank, ceramic and porcelain tiling.
- [Wet Works & Plumbing](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/wet-works-plumbing/): Bathroom renovation, waterproofing, and plumbing reconfiguration.
- [Aluminium & Glass Works](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/aluminium-glass/): Windows, sliding doors, glass partitions, and grille fabrication.
- [Authority Submission & Permits](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/services/authority-submission/): Building plan approvals and permit submissions for extensions and office renovations.

## Locations served

- [Petaling Jaya](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/areas/petaling-jaya/): Head office location; covers all PJ neighbourhoods.
- [Subang Jaya & USJ](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/areas/subang-jaya-usj/)
- [Puchong](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/areas/puchong/)
- [Kuala Lumpur](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/areas/kuala-lumpur/)

## Completed projects

Full portfolio at [/projects/](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/). Each project page includes year completed, duration, location, scope of works, and photos.

- [Hillcrest](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/hillcrest/): Bungalow renovation, Petaling Jaya, 2022.
- [KLIA Control Tower](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/klia-control-tower/): Government facility renovation, Kuala Lumpur.
- [Mercedes-Benz](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/mercedes-benz/): Commercial showroom fit-out, Kuala Lumpur.
- [Montessori C180](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/montessori-c180/): Commercial/education fit-out, Petaling Jaya, 2022.
- [Platinum Arena](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/platinum-arena/): Residential renovation, Subang Jaya/USJ.
- [Sierra 6 Puchong](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/sierra-6-puchong/): Condominium interior renovation, Puchong, 2023.
- [Skinny Dip](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/skinny-dip/): Commercial fit-out, Kuala Lumpur/Petaling Jaya.
- [USJ 17](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/usj17/): Residential corner unit renovation, Subang Jaya/USJ.
- [Za Altera](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/za-altera/): Commercial fit-out, Kuala Lumpur.
- [Knowledge Hub, Jaya One](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/knowledge-hub-jaya-one/): Corporate training centre fit-out, Jaya One, Petaling Jaya, 2025.
- [PJ Midtown Office](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/pj-midtown-office/): Office fit-out for a technology and engineering company, PJ Midtown, Petaling Jaya, 2025.
- [Accountant Office, SS2](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/accountant-office-ss2/): Office fit-out and refurbishment, SS2, Petaling Jaya, 2025.
- [Sri Murni, Kuala Lumpur](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/sri-murni-kl/): Condominium refurbishment, Old Klang Road, Kuala Lumpur, 2025.
- [Klang Residence](https://sunsynergycontracts.com.my/projects/klang-residence/): Whole-home renovation, Taman Gembira, Klang, 2026.
